item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 2h Rare that you go into Sunday with two players T3 and think you've no chance, but that is th
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 2h Rare that you go into Sunday with two players T3 and think you've no chance, but that is the unavoidable conclusion when first is a course-specialist, in-form, world-class defending champion, and second is Scheffler. Quite freeing. And I felt the same on Sunday of the Hero. 9 15 5 mil
